ops.text: The cc-guides guards nudge on editing a fragment SOURCE (.claude/fragments/**) but stay silent on editing a rendered ARTIFACT (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md) directly — the artifact edit is the canonical breakage and it sailed through, costing a red Guides run and a fix commit. Each artifact's line 1 carries a machine-checkable 'GENERATED by cc-guides' marker; a PreToolUse Edit/Write guard matching that first line would catch it before commit.
